title: Twitch Stream
description: Represents an active live stream on Twitch, including broadcaster information, game category, viewer count, and stream metadata.

user_id.description: ID of the user who is streaming

user_login.description: Login name of the user who is streaming

user_name.description: Display name of the user who is streaming

game_id.description: ID of the game/category being played

game_name.description: Name of the game/category being played

type.description: Stream type (live or empty string if offline)

started_at.description: UTC timestamp when the stream started

thumbnail_url.description: URL template for the stream thumbnail

is_mature.description: Whether the stream is marked as mature content
